ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disasters" (
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster type */,
  "disaster_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster type (e.g., Earthquake, Flood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disaster type */,
  "disaster_type" TEXT /* Type of disaster (e.g., natural, human-induced) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of disaster (e.g., environmental, economic) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the disaster (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Economic Crises, Human-Induced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk score */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "score" REAL /* Risk score value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_indicators" (
  "disaster_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster-indicator relationship */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the disaster type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_indicators_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_indicators" (
  "region_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-indicator relationship */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_indicators_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_disasters" (
  "region_disaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-disaster relationship */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_disaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_disasters_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_disasters_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the disaster report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_reports_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_planning" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "scenario_date" TEXT /* Date the scenario was generated */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Text of the scenario plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_planning_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_planning_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* GIS data for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GIS data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GIS data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sensor_data" TEXT /* Sensor data for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
